elements.name: Verify the home block with image and logo

steps.name: the home sign up block with image should be visible
the brand logo sign up should be visible

elements.name: Test language switch between French and English with slogan

steps.name: the signup language is switched to French
the signup slogan should be "Votre réussite avant tout."
the signup  text should be "Saisissez votre adresse électronique"
the signup language is switched to English
the signup title should be "Let’s get started!"
the signup slogan should be "Driven By your success."
the signup  text should be "Enter your email address"
the signup footer link "Terms of Use" should redirect to "Terms"
the signup footer link "Privacy Policy" should redirect to "Privacy"
